title: Driving Techno
summary: 130 BPM Berlin-style techno - punchy four-on-floor, hypnotic synth stab, deep warehouse mood.
prompt: A driving Berlin warehouse-techno instrumental at 130 BPM. Punchy four-on-the-floor kick with reverb tail, off-beat open hi-hat, hypnotic minor-key synth stab repeating, deep sub-bassline, occasional sweeping noise risers, sparse vocal-snippet processed through delay. Cold industrial atmosphere - Berghain / Drumcode lineage. Relentlessly forward-moving.
